plugins.name: costar-coach-plugin
plugins.description: Converts rough descriptions or ideas into well-structured prompts using the COSTAR framework (Context, Objective, Style, Tone, Audience, Response), and executes the generated prompts to provide detailed and actionable responses when necessary.

plugins.name: crispe-coach-plugin
plugins.description: Converts rough descriptions or ideas into well-structured prompts using the CRISPE framework (Context, Role, Instruction, Specification, Performance, Example), and executes the generated prompts to provide detailed and actionable responses when necessary.

plugins.name: auto-skill-update-plugin
plugins.description: Automatically detects when a skill was recently used and the user signals it should be improved, then applies minimal, surgical edits to the skill definition -- covering new trigger patterns, handling cases, or examples without rewriting wholesale.

plugins.name: prompt-convert-trigger-plugin
plugins.description: Automatically detects complex or multi-step tasks and converts them into structured COSTAR or CRISPE prompts. Triggers proactively when user requests involve 3+ steps, multiple conditions, vague requirements, multi-file scope, or research plus implementation work.
